radar_score.subtitle: Market mood today
radar_score.tooltip: Radar Score measures market mood based on BTC, S&P 500 and Gold movements. 100 = extreme optimism, 0 = panic.
radar_score.note: Radar Score = average of S&P 500, BTC and Gold movements. Indicative only.

milionari.tagline: World's greatest investors. Their life advice. For free.

ipo.hero_subtitle: A company decides to raise money from the public. It issues shares. You can buy them. Sometimes you get rich. Sometimes not. Always exciting.
ipo.warning: IPOs are riskier than buying established stocks. Only invest what you can sleep on.
ipo.disclaimer: * Dates and prices are indicative and may change. Source: Bloomberg, Reuters.

dane.hero_subtitle: Sold Apple after one year? You pay 15% tax. Waited 3 years? Zero. Patience = legal tax optimization.
dane.time_test_desc: The most important rule in Czech tax law for investors.
dane.under_3y_desc: Pay 15% capital gains tax (income above CZK 100,000/year).
dane.over_3y_desc: Tax exempt! Time is your cheapest tax advisor.
dane.dip_desc: New tax tool since 2024. Deduct up to CZK 48,000/year from your tax base.
dane.when_file: When to file a tax return?
dane.calc_desc: Enter your profit → we'll show the tax.
dane.disclaimer: We are not tax advisors. When in doubt, consult an accountant or tax advisor.
dane.cta_heading: Want to know more about investing?

tym.hero_subtitle: Yes, our team is largely AI agents. No, we're not ashamed. Yes, it works better than 99% of traditional newsrooms.
tym.team_section_subtitle: Yes, they are AI agents. No, we're not ashamed.
tym.ceo_bio: I'm proof you don't need an MBA to navigate investing. Student, athlete and founder of Radar. I believe financial education should be for everyone — not just those who know what P/E ratio means.
tym.ceo_quote: "I lead a team... a bit unusual. But the results are real."
tym.tagline_1: Yes, our team are AI agents.
tym.tagline_3: Yes, it works better than 99% of newsrooms.
tym.agent_analyst_bio: Reads 500 articles per hour. Never complains. Never takes a sick day. Eats data for breakfast.
tym.agent_editor_bio: Writes faster than you can read. Loves precise numbers and great headlines. Reuters meets TikTok.
tym.agent_social_bio: 10 posts a day. Never runs out of ideas. Slightly obsessive about hashtags.
tym.agent_alert_bio: Never sleeps. Ever. Monitors 40+ sites 24/7. If human, would be a detective.
tym.agent_newsletter_bio: Every Monday at 8:00 AM without exception. More precise than Swiss watches. Hates spam.
tym.join_desc: Radar is growing. We're looking for people who want to build the future of financial journalism.

onboarding.title: Starting to invest
onboarding.subtitle: 3 steps to take you from zero to investor
onboarding.step1_desc: Read our Know How articles. 10 minutes of reading = a foundation that lasts a lifetime.
onboarding.step2_desc: XTB, Degiro or Revolut. Takes 10 minutes. No big capital needed — start with $20.
onboarding.step3_desc: $50/month into a global ETF. Set a standing order. And stop checking prices every day.
onboarding.done_desc: Read our newsletter — every Monday morning we pick the most important stuff for you.

krypto.radar_tip_text: Never invest more in crypto than you can afford to lose. No exceptions.

forex.radar_tip_text: Travelling abroad? Exchange money via Wise or Revolut — bank exchange rates have a hidden margin of 2–4%.
